elements.label: Flowchart
elements.onclick:
insertText('flowchart TD
    A[Start] --> B{Decision}
    B -- Yes --> C[Action]
    B -- No --> D[End]
')

elements.label: Sequence
elements.onclick:
insertText('sequenceDiagram
    participant A
    participant B
    A->>B: Request
    B-->>A: Response
')

elements.label: Class
elements.onclick:
insertText('classDiagram
    class Animal {
        +String name
        +speak()
    }
    Animal <|-- Dog
')

elements.label: State
elements.onclick:
insertText('stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Idle
    Idle --> Running : start
    Running --> Idle : stop
    Running --> [*] : finish
')

elements.label: ER
elements.onclick:
insertText('erDiagram
    CUSTOMER ||--o{ ORDER : places
    ORDER ||--|{ LINE-ITEM : contains
')

elements.label: Gantt
elements.onclick:
insertText('gantt
    title Project Plan
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    section Phase 1
        Task A :a1, 2024-01-01, 7d
        Task B :a2, after a1, 5d
')

elements.label: Mindmap
elements.onclick:
insertText('mindmap
  root((Topic))
    Branch A
      Leaf 1
      Leaf 2
    Branch B
      Leaf 3
')

elements.label: Timeline
elements.onclick:
insertText('timeline
    title History
    2020 : Event A
    2021 : Event B
    2022 : Event C
')
